results.title: ‎Scribble Pass App - App Store
results.content:
- Ad-free experience - One-time purchase, yours forever FEATURES: - Simple drawing tools - easy for everyone - One phone OR everyone uses their own - Customizable timers or no time limit - Fun background music (toggle on/off) - True pass-and-play - no accounts or setup - Celebration when the word survives - Share the full chain on social media - No data collection - totally private - No internet needed Whether you call it telephone pictionary, garbled, or broken telephone with drawings - Scribble Pass brings people together for laughs! PARTY MODE TIPS: - Everyone sets the same number of players and rounds - Start at the same time - Pass phones clockwise around the circle - When you get YOUR phone back, compare results - Everyone has their own game to share WHAT PLAYERS ARE SAYING: "The [...] has their own game to share WHAT PLAYERS ARE SAYING: "The party mode is genius - we all played at once!" "Way better than everyone staring at their own screens" "We couldn't stop laughing at how wrong the drawings were" "Perfect for game night - no wifi needed!" Download now and start the fun! No account, no login, no setup - just open and play. Questions? Tap App Support in the App Store or visit our website. [...] Compatibility

results.title: “The Ring Doorbell Footage Of Her Tantrum Is Hilarious”: Neighbor War Has Guy Blasting 1900s Greek Chanting Music To Get Back At Annoying Lady | Bored Panda
results.content:
47

18

Link copied!

Share

Link copied!

Share

Living in a neighborhood comes with good and bad neighbors. Good neighbors are those who will always lend you a hand when shoveling snow or when you run out of sugar. Bad neighbors will probably only cause you annoyance and will complain about the most minuscule things.

This family had exactly that kind of neighbor, yet the man found a way to deal with the entitled neighbor in a particularly petty way. Because her thing was filing complaints about the most absurd things, he decided to turn the town code against her and treat her to a party with some 1900s Greek chanting music. And he did it in a way that’s legal.

### A man found a way to deal with his neighbor’s constant complaints to the authorities [...] Text discussing a small surprise party playing music on a Sonos speaker for Father’s Day.

results.title: What's new at ScribbleVet
results.content:
ScribbleVet will return an output with each section broken out by pet. This way you can record for both pets under the same appointment.

## July 11, 2024

### Archive your notes directly in the mobile app

You can now archive and unarchive notes in the mobile app! Once you are finished copying a note into your PIMS, you can click the pencil 'edit' button in the top right. At the bottom you will have the option to archive the note. Archived notes will move to the bottom of your appointment list so you can focus on what's left to do.

### Delete empty appointments or patients [...] ### Send client emails directly from ScribbleVet

ScribbleVet now includes a built-in email feature that allows you to send client updates directly from the platform. 

Once your practice sets up an authorized sender address in settings, you can email clients without leaving ScribbleVet. The message is sent from your clinic’s email, not a third party, so you can follow up without switching systems. .

Here’s how it works:

 Set up your practice’s sender alias the Practice Settings page
 Mark a note as reviewed then click “Email to client”
 Enter the client’s email and send directly from your authorized address [...] 📞 Client callback: Call clients from within ScribbleVet while both sides of the conversation are automatically captured and documented. Complete with a client-ready email summary of what was discussed.

🗂️ Staff meeting: Keep internal meeting conversations organized with structured notes for team meetings, planning sessions, and operational updates, making them easy to reference later.

🩺 Rounds: Summarize case rounds at the start of your shift and get an at-a-glance view of hospitalized patients you can easily reference throughout the day.

💉 Technician appointments: Document technician appointments quickly so you can stay focused on treatments while keeping up to date on your records.
